research.description: Run ChatGPT Deep Research through review:gpt, auto-send the staged prompt, wait for the result, and save the captured markdown note under research/ in the selected vault.
research.x-incur-hint: Use this when you need a deeper current-evidence scan that should leave a durable markdown note in the vault. Deep Research commonly takes 10 to 60 minutes, so keep the command running unless it errors. Murph defaults the overall timeout to 40m; raise `--timeout` for longer runs, and only use `--wait-timeout` when you want a different response-wait cap. Free-tier access may be more limited.
